content.text:
[cron:919eddd9-5ee9-40b2-a29e-3b9a14aa3c92 img-gen-1-queue-check] CHECK_IMG_QUEUE: Check the image generation queue and process any pending requests. Run: node /data/img-gen/img-claim.js img-gen-1 — if a request is returned (not null), process it following your SOUL.md workflow. Generate the image in Gemini, download it, call img-complete.js when done, then check the queue again for more pending requests.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 6:22 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.text: Queue check completed. Processed 1 image generation request (ID: 789). Crafted Gemini prompt from raw request. Generated 1 image (600x800px) using "professional corporate headshot" parameters. Downloaded to /data/image-requests/pending/789/image-1.png. Marked as complete via img-complete.js. Queue now empty.
